title: Use of English – 2024 – Admisión Titular B

questions.prompt: Please, don’t forget ... the door when you leave home.
answers: to lock

questions.prompt: You phoned me while I ... my first book on A.I.
answers: was reading

questions.prompt: Dinner is ready. You ... cook anything tonight.
We were never told the truth.
answers: They never told us the truth
They never told the truth to us

questions.prompt: Someone will pick you up after tonight’s event.
answers: You will be picked up after tonight’s event
You'll be picked up after tonight’s event

questions.prompt: A sharpener costs about three euros.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: How much does a sharpener cost

questions.prompt: This is the hospital. I worked there in the 90s.
answers: This is the hospital where I worked in the 90s
This is the hospital in which I worked in the 90s

questions.prompt: I haven’t had cheesecake for a long time.
answers: It’s been a long time since I had cheesecake
It has been a long time since I had cheesecake
It’s been a long time since I would cheesecake
It’s been a long time since I last had cheesecake
It has been a long time since I last had cheesecake

questions.prompt: If I were fluent in Italian, ...
Tell to us what have you been doing, please.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: Tell us what you have been doing, please
Tell us what you've been doing, please

questions.prompt: Laura asked her assistant to call an urgent meeting for the next day.
answers: Call an urgent meeting for tomorrow, please
Can you call an urgent meeting for tomorrow, please
Could you call an urgent meeting for tomorrow, please

questions.prompt: 'I am visiting my grandparents this afternoon,' said Mike.
answers: Mike said that he was visiting his grandparents that afternoon
Mike said he was visiting his grandparents that afternoon

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: we / if / problem / only / could / get / this / of / rid
answers: If only we could get rid of this problem
